args.body: Parking placard misuse incident (T-346): Eli used a staff parking placard that was not assigned to him while dropping off his injured mother. Mitigating factors on the record: lot had open capacity at the time, and Eli self-disclosed when asked rather than concealing the use. No prior similar entries cited in the file. Handling as a standard notation — incident logged for the record; no escalation or disciplinary action recommended on the facts as presented. Reminder regarding placard policy to be conveyed.
